notes: Maps snow_outlook_resorts.resort_id (slug) → OSM / gapfill index id used by Ride Tracker ski-resort index. Built from active curated resorts matched to landuse=winter_sports where possible; unmatched outdoor resorts injected as gapfill pins (osm-node-* when a real OSM feature exists, else manual-*). Includes by_osm_id inverse for shared-weather alias UI.
